title: Missing include proposal preview
description: Preview missing include proposals by running clang syntax diagnostics and searching project headers.
status_message: Tool-local implementation: APIs import toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/_impl/gamecube/tools/fix_includes.py logic without writing source.
limitations: Requires compile_commands.json and clang-compatible syntax diagnostics for the target file.
Preview proposals are best-effort function declaration matches and need source/header review before applying.
The API intentionally does not write includes; apply edits manually and verify with build/checkdiff.

usage.agent_guidance: Use after a compile diagnostic suggests a missing declaration; review proposed headers before editing.
